gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS directory.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage metrics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated daily checks of apps (greenhouse). The robot and the bee checking on plants (apps). Robot holding a clipboard or watering can.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on a row of glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
